responses: I'm good, thanks! How about you?
I don’t have a real name, just call me AI.
Why did the computer go to the doctor? Because it caught a virus!
I would tell you a UDP joke, but you might not get it.
Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs!
Why was the cell phone wearing glasses? It lost its contacts!
Why did the AI cross the road? To optimize its route!
I don't have an age like humans.
I love blue! What about you?
Colors are tricky… but I like red. Which one do you like?
I enjoy neon colors! What about your favorite?
I like purple! How about you?
